relations.note: Construction layering pairs the colorways defined by the colorway rule.

effect.reserved_for: Sunshine/Gold and Sky Blue/Deep Blue, long and short variants only
effect.subject: wave graphic colorways

quotes: Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.

rules.intent: Restrict the wave device to sanctioned colorways and variants.
rules.rule_text: Wave graphic elements exist in exactly two approved colorways — Sunshine/Gold (Sunshine #faa31b, Gold #ffc60a) and Sky Blue/Deep Blue (Sky Blue #358CCB, Deep Blue #003D74) — each available in long and short variants. Use approved color values only.

quotes: top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave
Construction: top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue) — always preserve the layered, translucent quality.

rules.intent: Maintain the signature layered/translucent wave construction.
rules.rule_text: Waves are constructed with a top wave layer at 70% transparency (wave.top_layer.opacity = 0.7) over the base wave — Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue. Always preserve the layered, translucent quality.

quotes: Usage: alone, or overlaid on photography or gradient backgrounds; to support layout flow, frame content, or add depth.

rules.intent: Guide appropriate placement of the wave device.
rules.rule_text: Waves may be used alone, or overlaid on photography or gradient backgrounds, to support layout flow, frame content, or add depth.

quotes: Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end
**Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.

rules.intent: Standardize the approved masthead copy-holding device.
rules.rule_text: The masthead gradient with logo mark (Sunshine #faa31b → light gold #ffe05c / 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.
